description: An issue in Shelly com.home.shelly 1.0.4 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the firmware update process
Claude Reasoning: The record names only the Shelly mobile application and its firmware-update process, with no product line and no CPE. Shelly's catalogue is dominated by relays, switches and energy meters rather than thermostats, so it cannot be determined whether a thermostat is among the affected devices.
